description: MassRobotics is the largest independent robotics hub dedicated to accelerating robotics innovation, commercialization and adoption. Our mission is to help create and scale the next generation of successful robotics and AI technology companies by providing entrepreneurs and startups with the workspace, resources, programming and connections they need to develop, prototype, test and commercialize their products and solutions. While MassRobotics originated and is headquartered in Boston, we are reaching and supporting robotics acceleration and adoption globally and are working with startups, academia, industry and governments both domestically and internationally. What is a MassRobotics resident startup? MassRobotics resident startups are dynamic companies dedicated to advancing robotics and supporting technologies. They aim to transform how we live, work, and play through innovative solutions. Joining MassRobotics means becoming part of a global community of experts and like-minded entrepreneurs. These startups cover a range of stages, from concept to manufacturing, and focus on robotics, AI, and connected devices.

Spiro is the Anti-CRM CRM built exclusively for manufacturers and distributors. Traditional CRMs create more work. Spiro eliminates it. We combine AI, ERP integration, and white-glove onboarding to help manufacturing sales teams stay on top of every account without wasting time on manual data entry. Spiro captures activity automatically, syncs with your ERP, and delivers proactive recommendations so reps can focus on closing deals, not updating records. Built for real manufacturing workflows, Spiro speaks the language of customer numbers, order history, ship-tos, and product lines. It connects to systems like SAP, Epicor, Infor, NetSuite, SYSPRO, and homegrown ERPs using API integrations, file-based sync, or direct database access. With Spiro, sales teams get: Complete records without typing Real-time ERP data inside every account AI-generated summaries and follow-ups Predictive insights into reorders, slowdowns, and at-risk customers Automatic reminders after calls and meetings Full mobile access with voice updates, photo capture, and business card scanning Managers get visibility without micromanaging. Reps get tools that work in the background. Leadership gets a platform that finally connects ERP and sales. No consultants. No bloated features. No busywork. If your team is tired of CRMs that slow things down, it’s time for the Anti-CRM CRM.

At DataKindⓇ, we believe in the transformative power of data science and AI to create a more promising future. Since our founding in 2012, we’ve been at the forefront of designing scalable, data-driven tools that address some of the world’s toughest challenges—ranging from frontline health, humanitarian action, climate and environment, economic opportunity, education, and more. As both a product innovator and a movement catalyst, we set new standards in the social sector, empowering organizations to harness the full potential of data science and AI while putting communities first. Our journey began with a bold idea that data science could change the world. In 2010, our founder shared this vision in a blog post. The idea resonated deeply. Within a week, over 300 people joined what would become the Data for Good movement, proving the potential of this vision. Two years later, DataKind was born, turning that spark into a sustained global effort. Today, DataKind continues to innovate, creating tools and solutions that are designed not just for individual organizations, but to address sector-wide challenges. Our work scales across communities, improving the ability of social impact organizations to tackle pressing issues. Support for our work has only grown, with a vibrant global community, dozens of corporations and foundations, and a talented staff on four continents. We remain a catalyst for the broader Data for Good movement, advancing the use of data science and AI to create sustainable, scalable impact for a better world. Support Our Work: https://www.datakind.org/support-us/fund-our-work/ Learn About Our Approach: https://www.datakind.org/our-work/our-approach/ Visit Our Blog: https://www.datakind.org/blog/

Schools and companies also use Brainscape to help *their* learners study more efficiently by combining our efficient web and mobile flashcards app with their existing curriculum. Finally, test prep *publishers* can partner with Brainscape to add mobile flashcards to their own product offerings, and to reach Brainscape's massive audience to expand their traffic. Brainscape's content partners have collectively earned millions of dollars in revenue. THE BOTTOM LINE Brainscape users aren’t just memorizing facts . . . they’re building real mastery. Whether you're preparing for a high-stakes exam or simply want to retain what you read, Brainscape empowers you to study more efficiently than ever before. Start leveling up your brain (and your students' brains) today!

Two thirds of supply chain planning across the globe is still being done using spreadsheets. Such dependency on manual work hinders the sharing of insights across different departments. This, in turn, slows down organizations’ ability and agility to respond to customer needs. Organizations who are looking to reduce the dependency on manual work typically invest in traditional ERP systems. These ERP systems may provide the basic logic behind planning and forecasting. However, the increasingly complex and uncertain business world demands much more than that. Now more than ever, businesses need to think about digital transformation and automation. Solvoyo is the true enabler of digital transformation. Our cloud based SaaS platform uses advanced analytics and artificial intelligence to optimize and automate decision making in supply chain planning. Our all-in-one platform forecasts demand, optimizes inventory, plans production, replenishes networks and concurrently optimizes fulfillment and transportation plans; eliminating silos while reducing the dependency on manual work. The scalability, analytical capabilities and short implementation cycles of our cloud platform help our clients achieve dramatic improvements. Solvoyo has over 40 successful deployments around the world, leading to significant and measurable outcomes for Fortune 100 CPG and Retail customers. For more information, please visit https:///www.solvoyo.com

THE COAST FLIGHT TRAINING EXPERIENCE At Coast Flight Training, we are here to ensure your success! Unlike other flight schools, Coast Flight is not a pilot mill – we advocate for you at every stage to safeguard your success. We will not let you invest your time and money without first ensuring you qualify to become a pilot. Our primary business goal is for our pilot candidates to be the best professional, responsible, highly trained pilots who the airlines will hire – your success is how we define success. Why do we position our flight school in this way? Through our relationships with the airlines, we know the needs they face when hiring pilots. In additional to the national pilot shortage, Regional Airlines find when they interview candidates after they have completed all of their training, that, at best, only 50% are qualified to be offered a position. How do we protect you from failing before you even begin your training? Aviation and Career Training Program – ACT™ Screening: This program advocates for candidates long before they ever invest their time or finances. Coast Flight Training pre-screens all applicants prior to them ever beginning their training, empowering candidates to make informed decisions prior to pursuing your career or investing your well earned money. Airline Partners: We fully understand the requirements of our partner airlines. ACT utilizes the parameters the airlines establish; leadership and professionalism are also part of our core curriculum. Our direct relationship with regional and major airlines keeps you in the pipeline for career placement. Individual Study: We are here to protect you, to guide you and to train you to ensure your success. In addition to the above, we offer one-on-one training with experienced instructors, proprietary screening, programs, training material, with success metrics and counseling for each student directly from our leadership Learn more at www.iflycoast.com !

Tribute Labs is pioneering the intersection of decentralized autonomous organizations (DAOs) and artificial intelligence (AI) to redefine the future of venture investing, governance, and digital communities. Based in New York, we leverage AI-driven capital management and blockchain-based governance to power next-generation investment DAOs, enabling more efficient, transparent, and democratic decision-making. Our Mission↴ We empower communities to self-organize, collaborate, and invest through internet-native, decentralized platforms. By building open-source frameworks, we enable groups to reimagine industries and replace traditional top-down structures with dynamic, community-driven governance models. Our Vision↴ We envision a future where decentralized systems and AI-driven decision-making work in perfect harmony. Rebellion Industries is designing a new category for the modern security and defense era—spanning national defense, critical infrastructure, and commercial environments where sensing, autonomy, and decision speed are mission-critical. Threat has changed. Conflict and disruption are no longer episodic, geographically bounded, or slow-moving; they’re continuous, asymmetric, and defined by software, autonomy, and sensing at scale across airspace, borders, energy systems, supply chains, and data centers. Yet most systems remain disconnected: hardware sold in isolation, software added as visualization, and decisions left to manual coordination under pressure. Rebellion Industries is creating the category of unified sensing and decision infrastructure, otherwise as known as the Sensor OS. This category treats security as a continuously operating system, not a collection of tools. It fuses sensors, software, and autonomy into one intelligence layer that shares sensing (not siloed), turns data into decisions (not dashboards), and enables fast, adaptive response across military, government, and commercial domains. This category exists because speed, integration, and adaptability now matter more than static capability. Rebellion Industries is building the operating layer for modern security systems- the backbone for how these systems will be designed, deployed, and trusted.

Our products include: • AUDIBLEHEALTH AI is a Clinical Decision Support Software solution designed to screen for and detect respiratory diseases in the intricate patterns found in the sound of a human cough. Users cough for approximately 10 seconds into the AudibleHealth app, and a result is returned in around 30 seconds. At present the solution supports detection for Tuberculosis, COVID-19, Pneumonia, and Smoker status with another 15+ solutions in development. Future indications on the product roadmap include Measles, RSV, Influenza, Pertussis, Lung Cancer, and many more. • FCV SENTINEL is a threat-agnostic early warning system, based on RAIsonance’s proprietary cough analysis technology. This tool is designed to detect subtle changes that may be the result of exposure to a pathogen, chemical agent, or environmental toxin experienced by the user. For businesses and organizations, aggregate data is presented on interactive dashboards in near real time, and can be customized to track readiness by group, location, region, etc. • MYADVOCATE is designed to support those with chronic respiratory conditions such as COPD and asthma. The solution creates an in-depth, completely unique profile for each user, and then monitors even very small changes that indicate a problem with their respiratory health. MyAdvocate provides a fast, biometric, early-warning signal of a potential respiratory health issue. Connect with the RAIsonance Group of companies at www.raisonance.ai and at FCVWellness.com or on Twitter @RAIsonanceGroup.

Rockford Gray offers crisis management counsel, media training and presentation skills coaching. We provide strategic communications guidance for a diverse set of clients in industries varying from healthcare to construction to insurance to entertainment to hospitality to financial services to aerospace, government and more. The partners in Rockford Gray have made careers as journalists. This unique background informs our counsel and training with spokespeople, professional communicators and high-level executives. More than 20 years ago we held our first media skills workshop. That has evolved into small group, large group and one-on-one training that can be delivered over the course of a day or in one-hour chunks. We create scenarios for participants that are recorded and critiqued in real time. We are in the business of helping to prepare for and then manage a crisis. Rockford Gray’s solution to crisis response is four fold: 1. Create or update an actionable Crisis Plan. 2. Train the crisis team on how to execute on that plan through simulation exercises. 3. Provide real-time counsel to clients during crises. 4. Evaluate effectiveness, revise the plan and train again to keep everyone current. For presentation skills training we start by delivering Rockford Gray’s 12 Steps to Better Presentations. And then through videotaping simulated performances by our subject, we are able to identify strengths and weaknesses in the participant’s communication style. From this baseline, we then pinpoint positive communication behaviors that need to be converted into effective communication habits. Rockford Gray is also in the business of providing both strategic direction and media relations counsel either for short-term engagements, or over the length of a campaign. In Summary, our goal in strategic communications consulting is to minimize the client’s time investment and create an efficient communications process that achieves measurable outcomes.

With over 60 reactors around the world relying on our technology, Nuclearn is built on one simple idea: nuclear deserves better tools. Our team—made up of nuclear professionals and engineers—set out to modernize the industry by applying AI to some of its most critical, and often outdated, processes. “We saw this massive gap,” said Bradley Fox, CEO and co-founder. “You’ve got the tech to split atoms, but a lot of the supporting work is still done with decades-old systems. We knew AI could help streamline that complexity—making things safer, faster, and more efficient. It’s a win for the plants, and for the future of clean energy.” Jerrold Vincent, our CFO and co-founder, adds: “Back in 2016, we recognized the potential for AI to support nuclear—not just in cutting costs, but in preparing the next generation of workers. That’s why we started Nuclearn. We believe AI is one of the best tools we have to keep nuclear strong for the long haul.” The software we’ve built isn’t generic. It’s nuclear-specific, pre-trained, and ready to go—designed by people who’ve lived the process and know exactly what this industry needs.

Overview: AccutarBio employs artificial intelligence to revolutionize drug discovery. With capabilities in side chain flexible mode ligand docking, virtual screening, and drug ADME property prediction, Accutar’s platform beats the industry standard in computation-aided drug design. The company’s hybrid based approach, which uses computational drug design followed by wet lab validation, greatly reduces the time and cost necessary for traditional drug discovery efforts. Accutar is committed to building strong partnerships, and collaborates across academia and the pharmaceutical industry to solve interdisciplinary problems. The company was founded in 2015 and has locations in both Shanghai, China and New York, NY. Products & Services: Accutar offers two software packages: Chemi-Net and Orbital. Chemi-Net is a molecular graph convolutional network for accurate drug property prediction. It was recently shown to improve the accuracy of ADME property prediction by a large margin in comparison to the widely-used methods https://arxiv.org/abs/1803.06236. Orbital is a deep neural network based docking platform. The prediction accuracy of protein-ligand complex (holo) from ligand free state (apo) structure is significantly higher than current standards. In addition to these tools, AccutarBio offers services in virtual screening for lead discovery; intelligent-SAR for lead optimization and drug property prediction.

This is not an incremental improvement; it is a structural shift in how planning decisions are made. PolymatiQ™ deploys intelligent agents that operate in parallel, evaluating trade-offs at a scale that would otherwise require thousands of planners working simultaneously. Built natively on Salesforce, ketteQ connects planning directly to sales, service, and finance, creating a unified decision layer across the enterprise. As conditions change, PolymatiQ™ agents dynamically rebalance plans, simulate thousands of possibilities, and execute optimized outcomes with speed and precision. The result: • Faster decisions • Reduced risk • Improved service levels • Lower inventory • Stronger financial performance From global enterprises like Coca-Cola, Carrier, and NCR Voyix to fast-growing mid-market leaders, organizations choose ketteQ to move beyond reactive planning and toward intelligent, agent-driven orchestration. Because in a volatile world, advantage belongs to those who can plan and act across every possibility. Learn more at ketteQ.com.

CCR is a global non-profit organization dedicated to making education more relevant by answering the question: Why, What, and How should students learn for an age of A.I.? CCR brings together international organizations, jurisdictions, academic institutions, corporations, non-profit organizations, and foundations. Understanding the “Why” and reshaping the “What” and “How” of Education is ever-more critical in the context of economic and social justice/equity issues, which are being amplified by new technologies (AI, Biotech etc.) and planetary-wide problems (global warming, pandemic, etc.). The last major changes to the historical curriculum took effect in the late 1800’s as a response to the sudden growth in societal and human capital needs. As the world of the 21st century bears little resemblance to that of the 19th century, education curricula need to be deeply redesigned for the four dimensions of (modernized) Knowledge, Skills, Character, and Meta-Learning. Adapting to 21st century needs means revisiting each dimension and the interplay between them and modern pedagogy. CCR’s leading role in deep, synthesized, and applied research and product development is more timely than ever. CCR thus offers thought leadership (books, papers), and designs: * Standards/Curricula in partnership with jurisdictions, foundations, and school systems (Mathematics, World History, World Literature, Chemistry, Psychology, Sociology, etc.) * Courseware (Mathematics, Computer Science, AI, Cleantech, Nanotech, etc.) * Professional Development for Skills, Character, and Meta-Learning * Pedagogical and technology tools (Projects Portal, etc.) For more info, contact us at info@curriculumredesign.org

Coginiti is the Semantic Intelligence Platform that helps data teams build, govern, and operationalize trusted business logic across every data platform — so AI agents and humans make decisions from the same source of truth. Most organizations struggle to move AI from pilot to production. The bottleneck isn't model quality — it's data quality, fragmented definitions, and ungoverned business logic scattered across tools, teams, and platforms. Coginiti solves this by unifying the full lifecycle of business meaning: from development and testing through semantic definition, governance, and enterprise-wide consumption. The platform includes two purpose-built AI agents: Coginiti Smith helps data teams define and govern the universal semantic graph — standardizing metrics, authoring transformations, and encoding business context. Coginiti Guide enables business users and AI applications to query governed data in natural language, operating within the semantic contract Smith defines. Core capabilities: 21+ native data platform connections, CoginitiScript for modular analytics, a shared catalog with version control and code review, data lineage, agent observability, enterprise API access (JDBC/ODBC, REST), and native orchestration. What makes Coginiti different: Unlike tools that start at metric definitions and work outward, Coginiti was built from data operations upward. The semantic layer is the capstone of a comprehensive DataOps workflow — not a standalone product. Every metric traces back to the development, testing, and review that produced it. Coginiti connects to 21+ platforms including Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift, Oracle, SQL Server, and legacy systems. It deploys in cloud, hybrid, on-prem, and air-gapped environments with IL2-IL6 security and Zero Trust architecture. 300+ organizations across government, defense, healthcare, financial services, and retail trust Coginiti to operationalize the meaning of their data.

description: The Manned Space Flight Education Foundation Inc. is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational foundation with an extensive science education program and a space museum. Space Center Houston has something for all ages. You can touch a Moon rock, see real spacecraft and go behind the scenes at NASA. Visitors come from all over the world to view the largest collection of space artifacts in the Southwestern United States. Since opening in 1992, Space Center Houston has welcomed more than 22 million visitors and currently hosts 1 million visitors annually in its 250,000-square-foot educational complex. The center earned a 2016 Top Workplaces Award by The Houston Chronicle and generates annually a $118.7 million economic impact, 1,710 jobs and $53.7 million in personal income in greater Houston, according to a 2018 economic study by Quanticon, LLC researchers Stephen Cotton, PhD, and Jason Murasko. Raisonance is headquartered in the Denver Tech Center in Colorado, dedicated to Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning-based healthcare solutions, focused on using artificial intelligence to detect patterns in the sound of human coughs. RAIsonance companies operate a suite of respiratory solutions to detect and screen for specific respiratory illnesses and to monitor respiratory wellness. Our products include: • AUDIBLEHEALTH AI is a Clinical Decision Support Software solution designed to screen for and detect respiratory diseases in the intricate patterns found in the sound of a human cough. Users cough for approximately 10 seconds into the AudibleHealth app, and a result is returned in around 30 seconds. At present the solution supports detection for Tuberculosis, COVID-19, Pneumonia, and Smoker status with another 15+ solutions in development. Future indications on the product roadmap include Measles, RSV, Influenza, Pertussis, Lung Cancer, and many more. • FCV SENTINEL is a threat-agnostic early warning system, based on RAIsonance’s proprietary cough analysis technology. This tool is designed to detect subtle changes that may be the result of exposure to a pathogen, chemical agent, or environmental toxin experienced by the user. For businesses and organizations, aggregate data is presented on interactive dashboards in near real time, and can be customized to track readiness by group, location, region, etc. • MYADVOCATE is designed to support those with chronic respiratory conditions such as COPD and asthma. The solution creates an in-depth, completely unique profile for each user, and then monitors even very small changes that indicate a problem with their respiratory health. MyAdvocate provides a fast, biometric, early-warning signal of a potential respiratory health issue. We knew AI could help streamline that complexity—making things safer, faster, and more efficient. It’s a win for the plants, and for the future of clean energy.” Jerrold Vincent, our CFO and co-founder, adds: “Back in 2016, we recognized the potential for AI to support nuclear—not just in cutting costs, but in preparing the next generation of workers. That’s why we started Nuclearn. We believe AI is one of the best tools we have to keep nuclear strong for the long haul.” The software we’ve built isn’t generic. It’s nuclear-specific, pre-trained, and ready to go—designed by people who’ve lived the process and know exactly what this industry needs.

We are the team behind the synthetic data vault. DataCebo is an AI company dedicated to solving the world's data availability problems using AI generated synthetic data. Raisonance is headquartered in the Denver Tech Center in Colorado, dedicated to Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning-based healthcare solutions, focused on using artificial intelligence to detect patterns in the sound of human coughs. RAIsonance companies operate a suite of respiratory solutions to detect and screen for specific respiratory illnesses and to monitor respiratory wellness. Our products include: • AUDIBLEHEALTH AI is a Clinical Decision Support Software solution designed to screen for and detect respiratory diseases in the intricate patterns found in the sound of a human cough. Users cough for approximately 10 seconds into the AudibleHealth app, and a result is returned in around 30 seconds. At present the solution supports detection for Tuberculosis, COVID-19, Pneumonia, and Smoker status with another 15+ solutions in development. Future indications on the product roadmap include Measles, RSV, Influenza, Pertussis, Lung Cancer, and many more. • FCV SENTINEL is a threat-agnostic early warning system, based on RAIsonance’s proprietary cough analysis technology. This tool is designed to detect subtle changes that may be the result of exposure to a pathogen, chemical agent, or environmental toxin experienced by the user. For businesses and organizations, aggregate data is presented on interactive dashboards in near real time, and can be customized to track readiness by group, location, region, etc. • MYADVOCATE is designed to support those with chronic respiratory conditions such as COPD and asthma. The solution creates an in-depth, completely unique profile for each user, and then monitors even very small changes that indicate a problem with their respiratory health. MyAdvocate provides a fast, biometric, early-warning signal of a potential respiratory health issue. Connect with the RAIsonance Group of companies at www.raisonance.ai and at FCVWellness.com or on Twitter @RAIsonanceGroup.

We seed and grow companies that will revolutionize business by delivering the promise of AI to the enterprise. We look for entrepreneurs that do what has never been done before. We invest in three areas: - Cyber Security - Digital Health - Vertical Industry Applications Wayne and Armando started in venture on the same day in June 2000. We have successfully invested and helped build portfolio companies across multiple industries. We have achieved profitable exits through major financial events such as the Dotcom crash, the 2008 recession, and other ups and downs. We each separately learned at Caltech and MIT to rigorously examine both our successes and failures to improve our desired outcomes. This has led us to the investment strategy we are pursuing at Tensility. Here are our principles: -We believe in the primacy of artificial intelligence and predictive analytics for doing incredible things. Early computing transported, integrated, and cleansed data at central points. The decentralization of computing resources, including mobile, improved enterprise-wide utilization of assets and reduced costs. Open source democratized the access to leading edge technologies. Big data and cloud brought low cost compute cycles to bear on huge data sets. Now we will see advancements from smarter software to create incredible functionality. -We believe that it is important to listen to entrepreneurs, to our portfolio company leaders, to our advisers, to our co-investors and fellow board members, and to our team. While we do provide honest and constructive feedback, we are experienced enough to know that we alone do not have all the answers. -We believe in pioneering entrepreneurs that can transform industries. While good companies can come from evolutionary strategies that improve upon the status quo, we prefer bold new ideas that can change the landscape. -We believe our model for venture creates the best possible outcomes for both entrepreneurs and our entrepreneurial LPs.

CCR is a global non-profit organization dedicated to making education more relevant by answering the question: Why, What, and How should students learn for an age of A.I.? CCR brings together international organizations, jurisdictions, academic institutions, corporations, non-profit organizations, and foundations. Understanding the “Why” and reshaping the “What” and “How” of Education is ever-more critical in the context of economic and social justice/equity issues, which are being amplified by new technologies (AI, Biotech etc.) and planetary-wide problems (global warming, pandemic, etc.). The last major changes to the historical curriculum took effect in the late 1800’s as a response to the sudden growth in societal and human capital needs. As the world of the 21st century bears little resemblance to that of the 19th century, education curricula need to be deeply redesigned for the four dimensions of (modernized) Knowledge, Skills, Character, and Meta-Learning. Adapting to 21st century needs means revisiting each dimension and the interplay between them and modern pedagogy. CCR’s leading role in deep, synthesized, and applied research and product development is more timely than ever. CCR thus offers thought leadership (books, papers), and designs: * Standards/Curricula in partnership with jurisdictions, foundations, and school systems (Mathematics, World History, World Literature, Chemistry, Psychology, Sociology, etc.) * Courseware (Mathematics, Computer Science, AI, Cleantech, Nanotech, etc.) * Professional Development for Skills, Character, and Meta-Learning * Pedagogical and technology tools (Projects Portal, etc.) For more info, contact us at info@curriculumredesign.org
